message:
test(core): add 21 config tests for search engine, shadow mode, rollout, console parsers

SearchEngine (+5): parse all aliases, requires_semantic, uses_lexical,
is_shadow, Display.

SearchShadowMode (+4): parse all aliases, is_active, returns_v3, Display.

SearchRolloutConfig (+6): effective_engine global/override/kill-switch
degradation (semantic->legacy, hybrid->lexical, auto->lexical),
should_shadow delegation.

Console parsers (+3): ConsoleUiAnchor, ConsoleSplitMode, ConsoleThemeId
parse with all aliases and case insensitivity.

Config::is_production (+1): development default, production flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
